titleStmt.title: SII 9.387: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 387. (A.R. No. 256 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE SITE OF A RUINED MATHA AT MANNERA-MASALAVADA, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1219, Hēmaḷambi, Mārgaśira, śu. 5, Guruvāra corresponding to A.D. 1297 November 20, Wednesday, not Thursday, in the reign of the Yādava king Rāmachandradēva. It records a gift of some plots of land to Vinayachandradēva, disciple of Nēmichandra-Rāvuḷa of the Postaka-gachchha, Dēśi-gaṇa and Mūla-saṅgha, by the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Bhairavadēvarasa, a Vaishṇava in faith, with the Gauḍas and others for the Jina temple at Mosaḷevāḍa, which was repaired by Kēśava-Paṇḍita, son of Sāvanta-Paṇḍita, the prime-minister of the Mahamaṇḍalēśvara Sāḷiveya Tīkamadēva-Rāṇeya. It also records the grant of some other plots of land by the eight Hiṭṭus and the people of the village, with Pārisa-Gauḍa of Hagaranūru at their head, to the temple of Pārśvanāthadēva constructed by Kannāyi at Moasaḷavāḍa. Kannāyi is stated to be the mother of Kēśava-Paṇḍita.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ .
jīyāttraiḷōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ .
bhadraṁ bhavatvakhiḷadhārmmikapuṁḍarīkaṣaṁḍāvabō
dhanasumitradivākarāya . saṁsārasāgaravicitra
tamaghnajaṁtōrhastāvaḷaṁbanakritō jinaśāsanāya . svasti śrīmatuyādavanā
rāyaṇaṁ bhujabaḷaprauḍhapratāpacakravartti śrīvīrarāmacaṁdradēvavijayarā
jyōdayada sakavarusa 1219 neya hēmaṇaṁbisaṁvatsarada mārggasira suddha 5 guruvāradalu
svasti śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ sāḷiveya tīkamadēvarāṇeyara śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ sāvan
tapaṁḍitara kaṁnāyigaḷa suputra kēsavapaṁḍitaru mosaḷevāḍadalu jīrṇnōddhāravāgi māḍsi
da jinālayakke Ā sthaḷada © svasti samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēsvaran Aivaḷeyā
nvitaṁ catussamayasamuddharanuṁ vaiṣṇavakuḷatiḷakanuṁ śrīmatprasaṁnacennakēsavadēvara dibya
śrīpādapadmārādhakarumappa maṁneya bhairavadēvarsarū gauḍū samastapraje parivāravū sthāna
māṁnyamukhyavāgi Ā jinālayada dharmmakke mūḍaṇadiśāvarada yiṁmaḍigauḍanavara keyiṁ
teṁkalu baḍagikaṁmāṟara keyiṁ paḍuvalu vaijanamācana keyiṁ mūḍalu hināṟiya
keyiṁ baḍagalu yereyoḷage koṭṭa mattaru nālku keṁgāḍu guttēsvaradēvara keyiṁ
teṁkalu mācabhōvana keyiṁ mūḍalu mūleya kētayana keyiṁ baḍagalu kōḍuyatavara mā
ḍuva keyiṁ paḍuvalu mattaru voṁdu mattaṁ biṭiyamageṟeyiṁ mūḍalu dēviseṭṭiya keyiṁ
baḍagalu gauḍugaḷa keyiṁ teṁkalu mūḍalu sāgaraya mēreyalu pūrvvada mattaru voṁdu
Aṁtu mattaru 6 vanū dēvara Amritapaḍige sarvvanamasivāyavāgi śrīmūlasaṁgha dē
sigaṇada postakagachcha nēmicaṁdrarāuḷara siṣyaru vinayacaṁdradēvarige dhārāpūrvvakaṁ ko
ṭṭaru dēvara naṁdādīvigege dhāre(ṁ)ṇne gāṇakkarasolege mēṭigoḷaga Iṣṭuvanū Ācaṁdrā
rkkasthāyiyāgi koṭṭaru © svasti śrīmatu hagaṟanūra pārisagauḍamukhyavāda muṁ murida
ṁḍa samastapraje sthānamāṁnya modalāda yeṁ2ṭu hiṭṭu sakalasāmmyavaṁtarū taṁmoḷēkamatya
vāgi kaṁnāyigaḷu māḍida mosaḷavāḍada śrīpārisvanāthaṁge Amritapaḍige koṭṭa keyi
vūriṁdaṁ mūḍaṇa deseyalu taraḷamāreyanāykana keyiṁ baḍagalu kaliseṭṭi māḍu
va kavuṁgina keyiṁ mūḍalu kavaḍeya dēviseṭṭi māḍuva keyiṁ paḍuvalu Ā kavaḍeya sāyise
ṭṭi māḍuva keyiṁ teṁkalu mattaru yere voṁdu sarvvanamaḥsivāyavāgi dēvara Amritapaḍige ko
ṭṭaru maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vvā yō harati vasuṁdharāṁ śaṣṭirvaruṣasa
haśrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.387 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
